ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "steps_to_reproduce" TEXT /* Detailed steps to reproduce the test scenario */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the test case */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., user name or test case name) */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., PASS, FAIL) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the test case belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., Draft, Ready for Review, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case version */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test case */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_tags_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Test Engineer, Project Manager, Admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes or observations from the test execution */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_result_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result detail */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "screenshot" TEXT /* Screenshot from the test execution */,
  "log" TEXT /* Log from the test execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_result_details_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environment_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environment_config_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that identified the defect */,
  "defect_description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the defect (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the defect (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the defect (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the defect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the defect was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the defect was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_execution_history" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test case */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test case execution (e.g., PASS, FAIL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the execution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_execution_history_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_execution_history_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_environments" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_environments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_environments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id")
)
